commands.name: python3 scripts/validate_factory_pilot_evidence.py
commands.evidence: Verified pilot proof chain, scope closure, bounded repair task, review report, and ship packet.

commands.name: make prepush-full

acceptance_results.check: Pilot evidence includes work-proof marker, validation report, scope closure report, repair task, review report, and ship packet.
Full MVP closure is not falsely claimed.
First missing MVP slice is converted to a bounded repair task.

test_scope: Downstream Factory pilot evidence and PRD scope closure for the current Lumyn MVP slice.
independent_validation: Local validation script independently checks evidence refs and closure/repair semantics.
